locations.name: 圣多美和普林西比
locations.summary: 圣多美與普林西比民主共和国（葡萄牙語：República Democrática de São Tomé e Príncipe），通稱聖多美與普林西比（São Tomé e Príncipe），是位于中非西部的岛国，由圣多美岛、普林西比岛…

locations.name: José Vicente Barbosa du Bocage
locations.summary: José Vicente Barbosa du Bocage (2 May 1823 – 3 November 1907) was a Portuguese zoologist, politician, and professor.

locations.name: 圣多美岛
locations.summary: 圣多美岛（葡萄牙語：Ilha de São Tomé）是圣多美和普林西比第一大岛。该岛总面积854 km2（330 sq mi），总人口157,000（2009），占全国的96%。圣多美岛与周边小岛构成圣多美省。该岛位于赤道以北2 km，…

relations.subject: São Tomé prinia
relations.evidence: thumb|eggs - MHNT The São Tomé prinia (Prinia molleri) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is endemic to São Tomé and Príncipe and is found in the island of São Tomé. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forest and subtropical or tropical moist shrubland
